title: Stable Farm
description: Transform your Minecraft farming with Stable Farm Mod: protect farmland from trampling, harvest crops efficiently with a hoe and gain experience orbs for a more rewarding and hassle - free agricultural adventure!
body:
# Stable Farm Mod: A New Experience of Stable Farming
In the vast world of Minecraft, farming often faces numerous challenges. However, the arrival of the Stable Farm Mod will bring unprecedented stability and convenience to your farming life!

## Key Features
### Stable Farmland, Resistant to Trampling
In the original game, farmland can easily turn back into dirt when trampled by players or mobs, which undoubtedly increases the difficulty and cost of farming. The Stable Farm Mod completely eliminates this hassle for you. No matter how much you run around in the fields or how freely mobs move through the farmland, the farmland will remain rock - solid and will no longer degrade due to trampling. You can plan your farm layout more freely and carry out various farming activities with peace of mind, making your farming journey smooth and trouble - free.

### Harvest with a Hoe and Gain Experience
When you right - click on mature crops with a hoe in hand, something amazing will happen. The crops will be quickly harvested, and an experience orb will be generated right on the spot. This unique harvesting method not only improves farming efficiency but also allows you to quickly accumulate experience and level up your character while harvesting crops. It enables you to enjoy the joy of a bountiful harvest and strengthen yourself at the same time during the process of managing your farm.

With the Stable Farm Mod, your farming journey will become easier, more stable, and full of fun. Come and experience it now!
